customer_addr:
GEORGE HYMAN MEM.RESEARCH BLDG RM 126
108 IRVING STREET NW
WASHINGTON, DC 20010

citations.narrative:
On May 20, 2026, an APHIS Official arrived at the research facility to conduct a routine inspection. At the time of
inspection, it was determined that the animal facility was closed and no regulated activity was conducted at the research
facility since July 1, 2025. The research entity changed its status as a research facility and failed to notify the Deputy
Administrator. A research facility shall notify the Deputy Administrator in writing of any change in operations affecting its
status as a research facility, within 10 days after making such change. Corrected on May 21, 2026 - Cancellation Letter
sent to Deputy Administrator
An exit interview was conducted with facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.30(c) 
   
Registration. 
On May 20, 2026, an APHIS Official arrived at the research facility to conduct a routine inspection. At the time of 
inspection, it was determined that the animal facility was closed and no regulated activity was conducted at the research 
facility since July 1, 2025. The research entity changed its status as a research facility and failed to notify the Deputy 
Administrator. A research facility shall notify the Deputy Administrator in writing of any change in operations affecting its 
status as a research facility, within 10 days after making such change. Corrected on May 21, 2026 - Cancellation Letter 
sent to Deputy Administrator 
 
An exit interview was conducted with facility representatives.
